message:
feat: support relative specifier resolution from external package referrers

Enable module resolution of relative specifiers (e.g., ./sub.mjs) when
the referrer is an external package (external:some-pkg). Previously
these were rejected with UnsupportedSpecifier; now the resolver computes
the base directory from the external referrer path, normalizes the
joined specifier, and probes registered external modules.

Add helper functions: external_referrer_directory() to derive the
package root from an external referrer path, normalize_external_
specifier_path() for path normalization without leading slashes, and
is_package_root_specifier() to detect bare package names vs subpath
imports (handles both unscoped and @scoped packages).

Update resolve_chain() to follow require() edges between external
package files in BunCompat mode, enabling CJS→ESM interop chains
within external packages.

Add unit tests for external relative resolution and resolve_chain
with scoped packages, update integration tests to verify the new
behavior replaces the old UnsupportedSpecifier error path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
